$comment: Layer C for TIER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The EVALUATE TRUE band selector is lowered to a nested IF/ELSE chain, so Layer C enumerates all four band paths and solves each >= band boundary (1000/500/100) plus each band's ROUNDED discount half-cent boundary by congruence within that band's path constraints (the lower-bound seeding from the solver stage matters here: half-cent solutions must be found ABOVE each band's threshold).

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TIER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tier)
